---
title: "Rhombus StreamDeck Plugin"
subtitle: "Controlling a physical security system from an Elgato Stream Deck"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

*A project done during my internship with Rhombus Systems from June 2025 - August 2025. Source on [GitHub](https://github.com/Muizzzzz/rhombus-streamdeck).*

## Overview

`rhombus-streamdeck` is a plugin I built that turns the physical buttons of an
Elgato Stream Deck into live controls for a [Rhombus](https://www.rhombus.com/)
security system. A single button press can start a camera stream, unlock an
access-controlled door, or play audio through a gateway. Each button shows
its real-time state right on the key itself.

It's a systems-integration project: a hardware-peripheral SDK on one side, the
Rhombus API on the other, and real-time state tracking tying them together,
written mostly in TypeScript with supporting shell scripts.

## What it does

### Camera control

Toggle a live camera feed on or off with one button. The plugin pulls the camera's
HLS stream from the Rhombus API and opens it in the MPV player via Streamlink, with
the button showing an on/off (green/red) state indicator.

### Door lock control

Send an unlock command to a Rhombus access-controlled door from a button press. The
button polls lock status every few seconds and reflects it visually, red for
locked, green for unlocked, so the current state is always visible at a glance.

### Audio gateway control

Start and stop audio playback through a Rhombus audio gateway, with the connection
status tracked live over a WebSocket and surfaced on the button.

## How it's built

- **Language & build:** TypeScript source compiled into a Node bundle with Rollup,
  built on the Elgato Stream Deck SDK (v2), targeting Node.js 20.
- **API integration:** talks to the Rhombus API for camera media URIs, door
  access control, and audio playback, using header-based token authentication.
- **Real-time state:** door status via periodic polling; audio via WebSocket
  connection monitoring; per-device state keyed on each action's UUID.
- **Media handling:** shell scripts drive MPV and Streamlink to play camera HLS
  streams outside the plugin process.

**Tech stack:** TypeScript · Node.js · Elgato Stream Deck SDK · Rollup · Shell · Rhombus API · WebSockets

## Source

Full source, build configuration, and setup instructions are on GitHub:
[github.com/Muizzzzz/rhombus-streamdeck](https://github.com/Muizzzzz/rhombus-streamdeck).
